snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi()
client.search_rule_types()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi()


async def main() -> None:
    await client.search_rule_types()


asyncio.run(main())
